## 0. Glossary (the "what even IS this?" cheat sheet)

| Term | One-line |
|---|---|
| **Steward** | The autonomous-maintenance agent. Reads `cortex/recommendations.md` → plans an edit (deterministic or LLM) → gates via `spec-verifier` + `npm test` → atomically commits → opens a draft PR → journals everything. Was codenamed Hermes through Sprint 1.9.1. |
| **action_kind** | A typed capability the Steward can run (e.g. `dep_update_patch`, `lint_fix_shipper`, `senior_tester_review`). 18 registered in `bin/steward/_lib/action-kinds.cjs`; each has acceptance criteria + topology (serial/parallel) + LLM-required flag. |
| **Spec-verifier** | Sprint 1.9.0 post-edit gate. Each action_kind declares `acceptance_criteria[]` of 6 kinds: `shell` / `file_predicate` / `regex` / `ears_text` / `llm_judge` / `read_set`. Fail = atomic rollback. |
| **Journal** | `$CORTEX_DATA_HOME/journal/YYYY-MM-DD-<slug>.jsonl` — append-only execution trace + tool-use log. Single source of truth for cost, what-ran-when, spec-violations. Read by `status.cjs`, `cortex-usage.cjs`, `cost-safety.cjs`. |
| **Lessons** | Sprint 1.8.3 ReasoningBank-lite. `$CORTEX_DATA_HOME/lessons/<slug>.jsonl` — failure root-cause + remediation hint per (action_kind, action_key). Seeded into next LLM prompt so Steward doesn't repeat mistakes. |
| **Recommendations** | `cortex/recommendations.md` — the queue Steward reads. Refilled nightly by `recommendation_harvest` action (closed PRs + CI failures + open issues). |
| **autoresearch** | Sprint 2.1 — overnight 3-candidate research burst before implementing an unfamiliar topic. ~$0.022/run, cron Sunday 02:00 UTC. |
| **Stryker** | Mutation testing — injects bugs into source and runs the test suite to check tests actually CATCH bugs (not just execute lines). Cortex uses Stryker 9.6 in measure-only baseline (no break-threshold). **Currently parked on workflow_dispatch only** — Sprint 2.41 backlog. |
| **"Stryker cron"** | Used to be a scheduled Sunday 03:00 UTC run. **Disabled in 44a081a** because of cascading latent bugs (lockfile gitignore drift + invalid CLI flag + sandbox `FIXTURE_SHA_DRIFT`). Now manual-dispatch only. |
| **Hook** | Claude Code lifecycle callback registered in `~/.claude/settings.json`. Cortex ships 8 (session-start, pre-tool-use, post-tool-use, pre-compact, block-destructive, auto-orchestrate, tirith-scan, pre-commit-review-gate). Fail-open by contract. |
| **Auto-orchestrate** | `UserPromptSubmit` hook. On "new-impl" prompt patterns it injects the 3-fronta rule (Research parallel → Implementation single-thread → Review parallel) + research-cache freshness + budget warning into context. **Nudge, not gate.** |
| **Block-destructive** | `PreToolUse` hook on Bash. Hard-denies regex-matched destructive commands (force-push, hard reset, drop-table, --no-verify, etc.). |
| **Pre-commit-review-gate** | `PreToolUse` hook (Sprint 2.39). Denies `git commit` of ≥3 staged files when no review-agent ran this session. `deny` goes to the AGENT, not a prompt to the operator. Escape: `[skip-review]` or `CORTEX_REVIEW_GATE=0`. |
| **R1 / R2** | R1 = research-before-assert (web-research current state before claiming a fact). R2 = review pipeline (6 adversarial agents in parallel on non-trivial diffs). Both are project-wide operating principles in the CLAUDE.md augment block. |
| **Review pipeline** | 6 agents in parallel: `blind-hunter`, `edge-case-hunter`, `acceptance-auditor`, `security-auditor`, `correctness-auditor`, `ssot-enforcer`. Plus a Sprint 1 "Pass-2 confidence validator" that re-derives each finding and filters < 75 confidence. |
| **Routing table** | `bin/steward/_lib/routing-table.cjs` — maps each action_kind to a model tier (cheap/balanced/premium/ensemble). Bumped to Opus 4.8 in Sprint 2.36. |
| **OpenRouter** | Default LLM engine for Steward. OpenAI-compat API. Built-in `fetch()`, zero-dep. Engine seam supports `mock` / `openrouter` / `claude-sdk` (stub). |
| **Phoenix / OTLP** | Sprint 2.0 observability. `otel-emitter.cjs` emits OTLP HTTP/JSON to Phoenix (OpenInference + gen_ai semconv). Fail-open: no endpoint → no-op; journal stays SSOT. |
| **augment block** | The Rule-1/R1/R2/voice/surgical discipline injected into `~/.claude/CLAUDE.md` via `cortex-claude-md-augment`. Currently at v6 (Sprint 2.44 — workflows awareness). Auto-loads in every Claude Code session, every project. |
| **CORTEX_DATA_HOME** | `~/.cortex` by default. Holds `journal/`, `lessons/`, `research/`, `insights/`, `projects/`, `wiki/`, `self-invocations/`. Operator data, separate from the cortex-x repo. |

## 1. Top-level map (where everything lives)

```
cortex-x/
├── bin/                33K LOC · 20 CLIs + Steward runtime (51 _lib primitives)
├── shared/             6K LOC · hooks/ (8) + skills/ (14) + bin/ stage shims
├── standards/          7K LOC · 30 standards across 5 tiers + 2 reference + 1 meta
├── prompts/            5K LOC · 20 reusable orchestrations (paste-style + slash-bound)
├── agents/             1K LOC · 10 review/orchestration agent definitions
├── detectors/          4K LOC · 19 deterministic detection probes
├── profiles/           1K LOC · 11 project profiles (yaml)
├── templates/          265 LOC · 14 Handlebars scaffolding templates
├── tools/              2K LOC · 9 supporting CLIs (verify-*, eval-*, summarize-*)
├── docs/               9K LOC · 43 RFCs + roadmap + research memos
├── evals/              2K LOC · senior-tester eval suite (5 fixtures + judge rubric)
├── tests/              41K LOC · 153 test files (3270 passing, 2 skipped)
└── .github/workflows/  3K LOC · 23 workflows (4 CI + 16 Steward cron + 3 special)
```

**Tests are biggest by LOC** (41K) — a healthy signal in an AI-agentic-first repo
where TDD-for-agents is non-negotiable per [`standards/testing.md`](../standards/testing.md).

---

## 2. Steward — the autonomous agent

### 2.1 What Steward IS (in one paragraph)

A typed dispatcher that reads `cortex/recommendations.md` → picks an
action_kind → applies edits (deterministic for `dep_update_patch` /
`lint_fix_shipper` / etc., LLM via OpenRouter for `recommendation` /
`pattern_transfer` / `tdd_red_green`) → gates the result through
`spec-verifier` + `npm test` → atomically commits → pushes → opens a draft PR
→ journals everything (cost, tokens, spec_failures). Halts safely on any
budget breach or policy violation. Engine is pluggable (`mock` / `openrouter`
/ `claude-sdk` stub). Cost gates: daily / weekly / monthly USD caps + token
velocity + cross-session loop detection. The 51 `_lib` primitives are
zero-dep CJS — no transitive trust surface.

### 2.2 The 3 entrypoints

| File | Role | Composition |
|---|---|---|
| [`bin/steward/dry-run.cjs`](../bin/steward/dry-run.cjs) (832 LOC) | **Plan-only.** No side effects. Emits a JSON plan to stdout. | halt-check → lock → journal-read (skip already-processed) → policy-check → recommendations.parse → trailers → unlock |
| [`bin/steward/execute.cjs`](../bin/steward/execute.cjs) (**2778 LOC — biggest file**) | Takes the plan, runs the full gauntlet, atomically commits or rolls back. | clean-tree → branch → action-engine (LLM/det) → spec-verifier gate → `npm test` verifier → commit → push → draft PR → journal |
| [`bin/steward/status.cjs`](../bin/steward/status.cjs) (430 LOC) | Observability CLI. Zero-config, no API key needed. | halt + lock + journal rollup + cost forecast + recent actions + self-invocations chain |

### 2.3 The 18 action_kinds (action-kinds.cjs registry)

**Shipped, deterministic** (`requires_llm=false`):

| Kind | What it does |
|---|---|
| `dep_update_patch` | npm outdated → patch-only bumps → npm test gate. Lockfile-aware. |
| `lint_fix_shipper` | `eslint --fix` + `tsc --noEmit`. Auto-fix style; non-fixable → gh issue. |
| `flaky_test_repair` | Scan `// HERMES-FLAKY:` markers, replace with `.skip`, open gh issue. |
| `recommendation_harvest` | Scan closed PRs + CI failures + issues, append candidates to `recommendations.md`. |
| `doc_drift` | Scan exported symbols vs README/CLAUDE.md, file gh issue per gap. |
| `todo_triage` | TODO/FIXME aged > N days, dedupe vs issues, file gh issues with blame. |
| `test_coverage_gap` | Cross-ref coverage + recent edits, file gh issues for gaps. |
| `pr_review_responder` | Poll Steward-PR comments, aggregate into summary issue. |
| `evolve_daily` | Phase A consolidation (validate journal, flag stale, per-day rollup). |
| `tech_debt_audit` | `qlty metrics/smells + knip` → snapshot to `cortex/debt-snapshot.json`. |
| `workflow_hardener` | Scan `.github/workflows/*.yml` for hardening gaps, propose patches. |
| `secret_history_sweep` | `trufflehog --only-verified` full history scan, gh issue per hit. |
| `senior_tester_review` | 16-smell detector (tsDetect + Sandoval + cortex-native) + optional LLM judge. |

**Shipped, LLM-required** (`requires_llm=true`):

| Kind | What it does |
|---|---|
| `recommendation` | Standard cortex/recommendations.md item; LLM edits → spec → test → atomic commit. |
| `pattern_transfer` | Read sibling-project lessons, distill cross-project patterns. Strict path safety. |
| `evolve_weekly` | Mine repeated-mistake candidates from journal (min_events=3, span=7d), LLM-validate top-3. |
| `wiki_consolidate` | Phase A: emit Obsidian wiki articles from `lessons.jsonl`. |

**Reserved, executor deferred** (`shipped_in: null`):

| Kind | Sprint | What it will do |
|---|---|---|
| `recommendation_harvest_parallel` | 2.2 | 2-worker fan-out variant of harvest; only `topology_safe: parallel` kind in v0. Registry-only; spawner deferred to 2.2.1. |
| `tdd_red_green` | 2.34 | Test-first loop. Requires named `target_tests` (no generic TDD prose). Anti-reward-hack: no test-assertion deletion. |

### 2.4 The 51 _lib primitives — clustered

| Cluster | Files | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| **Safety & policy** | `halt-check` · `lock` · `policy-check` · `safety` · `worktree-guard` | Halt sentinel · mutex · denylist · secret redaction · clone-check before edit |
| **Cost gates** | `cost-safety` · `routing-policy` | Multi-window USD caps + token velocity + loop detection. Per-action_kind budget enforcement. |
| **Verification** | `spec-verifier` (43K) · `verifier` · `snapshot-diff` · `eval-runner` · `eval-scorer` · `eval-judge` | 6-kind spec gate · `npm test` runner · prev/post file-size context · eval framework |
| **LLM routing & engine** | `routing-table` · `action-engine` (87K) · `external-adapter` · `splice` | Model picker (5-layer override precedence) · pluggable engine dispatcher · atomic edit primitives |
| **Git / GitHub** | `git-ops` · `git-trailers` · `gh-ops` | Branch + commit + push · Steward-* trailers · gh CLI wrapper |
| **Observability** | `journal` · `otel-emitter` (27K) · `otel-protobuf` (18K) · `self-invocation` | JSONL trace SSOT · zero-dep OTLP for Phoenix · invocation tracking |
| **Memory & learning** | `lessons` · `lessons-search` · `lessons-exporter` · `memory-decay` · `project-ledger` | ReasoningBank-lite · FTS5 lessons search · age-winnowing · success ledger |
| **Recommendations** | `recommendations` · `autoresearch` (35K) · `research-trigger` · `loop-detector` | Parser · 3-candidate research burst · trigger detection · cross-session loop halt |
| **Specialized actions** | `senior-tester-action` · `test-smell-detector` · `test-smell-registry` · `tech-debt-audit` · `secret-sweep-action` · `workflow-hardener-action` · `wiki-consolidate` · `evolve-weekly-action` · `skill-scaffolder` | Per-action_kind deterministic executors |
| **Cross-project** | `sibling-manifest` · `sibling-reader` · `topology` | Read-only sibling repos · multi-agent topology constraints |
| **Eval rubrics** | `llm-judge-schema` · `rubric-extractor` · `doc-agent-readability` | JSON schema for judges · markdown rubric parser · readability scorer |
| **Infrastructure** | `env` · `evolve-action` | Env-reader SSOT · evolve action skeleton |

### 2.5 Engine seam (LLM provider)

- **Pluggable backends** (3): `mock` (env-driven, tests), `openrouter` (default, real LLM), `claude-sdk` (stub — explicit opt-in returns `EX_USAGE` 64).
- **Routing site** — [`bin/steward/_lib/routing-table.cjs`](../bin/steward/_lib/routing-table.cjs) maps action_kind → model. Sprint 2.36 bumped premium to Opus 4.8.
- **Cost capture** — `action-engine.cjs` extracts `cost_usd` + `tokens_in/out` from OpenRouter headers; `execute.cjs` writes to journal; `status.cjs` rolls up; `cost-safety.cjs` gates new dispatches.

## 3. Hooks — the 8 lifecycle callbacks

### 3.1 The roster

| Hook | Event | Matcher | Role | Enforcement |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| [`session-start.cjs`](../shared/hooks/session-start.cjs) | SessionStart | — | Inject sprint state, git context, profile detection, budget summary, recovery nudges | **Log + nudge** |
| [`pre-tool-use.cjs`](../shared/hooks/pre-tool-use.cjs) | PreToolUse | * | Push `{ts, tool}` to tmpdir LIFO stack for duration correlation | **Log** |
| [`post-tool-use.cjs`](../shared/hooks/post-tool-use.cjs) | PostToolUse | * | Append journal entry · record Agent/Task/WebSearch spend · write review marker if review-agent fired | **Log + budget** |
| [`pre-compact.cjs`](../shared/hooks/pre-compact.cjs) | PreCompact | — | Save active sprint phase + story progress to `.claude/compact-state.md` | **Nudge** |
| [`block-destructive.cjs`](../shared/hooks/block-destructive.cjs) | PreToolUse | `Bash` | Hard-deny regex-matched: `rm -rf` · `git push --force` · `reset --hard` · `clean -f` · `DROP TABLE` · `--no-verify` · `cortex-uninstall --purge` | **HARD DENY** |
| [`auto-orchestrate.cjs`](../shared/hooks/auto-orchestrate.cjs) | UserPromptSubmit | — | Inject 3-fronta guidance + research-cache freshness + session budget on new-impl prompt patterns | **NUDGE** |
| [`tirith-scan.cjs`](../shared/hooks/tirith-scan.cjs) | SessionStart | — | Run `tirith scan` on CLAUDE.md / .cursorrules / .mcp.json BEFORE Claude loads them (prompt-injection defense). Optional Rust binary. | **Log** |
| [`pre-commit-review-gate.cjs`](../shared/hooks/pre-commit-review-gate.cjs) | PreToolUse | `Bash` (git commit) | Deny commit of ≥3 staged files when no review-agent fired this session. Escape: `[skip-review]` / `CORTEX_REVIEW_GATE=0` | **HARD DENY (conditional)** |

### 3.2 How they compose (one session lifecycle)

```
SessionStart
├─ session-start.cjs  → injects context (sprint, git, budget, nudges)
└─ tirith-scan.cjs    → scans CLAUDE.md for injection BEFORE load

UserPromptSubmit
└─ auto-orchestrate.cjs  → injects 3-fronta + budget on new-impl trigger

(any tool call)
├─ PreToolUse  ── Bash ─→  block-destructive   → DENY on destructive regex
│                          pre-commit-review-gate → DENY on unreviewed ≥3-file commit
│              ─ all ──→  pre-tool-use         → push to pending stack
│
└─ PostToolUse  ── * ──→  post-tool-use         → journal · budget · review-marker

PreCompact
└─ pre-compact.cjs   → save state to .claude/compact-state.md
```

### 3.3 State files (where hooks write)

| Path | Written by | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| `$CORTEX_DATA_HOME/journal/YYYY-MM-DD-<slug>.jsonl` | post-tool-use | Every tool call (privacy-safe metadata) |
| `$CORTEX_DATA_HOME/journal/.budget.jsonl` | post-tool-use | Agent/Task/WebSearch token + cost |
| `$CORTEX_DATA_HOME/.hook-errors.log` | any hook | Redacted error log, rotates at 16KB |
| `$OS_TMP/cortex-pending-<sessionHash>.jsonl` | pre/post-tool-use | LIFO stack for duration correlation |
| `$OS_TMP/cortex-review-<sessionHash>.flag` | post-tool-use | Session-scoped "review ran" marker — consumed by pre-commit-review-gate |
| `.claude/compact-state.md` | pre-compact | Recovery state across compactions |

### 3.4 Helper libs

| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| [`shared/hooks/_lib/redact.cjs`](../shared/hooks/_lib/redact.cjs) | SSOT for `SECRET_PATTERNS` (Bearer, sk-ant-, sk_live_, AKIA, ghp_, eyJ-JWT, DB URIs, ?token= query strings) + `validateCortexHome()` signature check |
| [`shared/hooks/_lib/budget.cjs`](../shared/hooks/_lib/budget.cjs) | Token-cost estimator per model (Opus 4.8 / Sonnet 4.6 / Haiku 4.5) + `recordUsage()` + `sessionTotal()` + `CORTEX_BUDGET_DISABLED=1` for flat-sub (Max x20) |
| [`shared/hooks/_lib/review-agents.cjs`](../shared/hooks/_lib/review-agents.cjs) (Sprint 2.39 SSOT) | The 6-name review-agent roster, imported by both post-tool-use (marker writer) and pre-commit-review-gate (deny-reason text). Test asserts it matches `agents/*.md` on disk. |

## 4. User-facing surface — CLIs · Skills · Agents

### 4.1 The 20 CLIs (operator-facing commands)

| Tier | Commands |
|---|---|
| **Lifecycle** | `cortex-bootstrap` · `cortex-update` · `cortex-uninstall` · `cortex-doctor` |
| **Registration** (opt-in mutators of `~/.claude/`) | `cortex-hooks-register` · `cortex-claude-md-augment` · `cortex-permissions-register` |
| **Insight** | `cortex-usage` (Sprint 2.38 NEW — hot/cold artifact rollup) · `cortex-insights` · `cortex-gap-report` · `cortex-dream` |
| **Capability** | `cortex-capabilities` (regen registry) · `cortex-skill-validate` · `cortex-propose-skill` |
| **Steward** | `cortex-steward` → `bin/steward/{dry-run,execute,status}.cjs` |
| **Memory** | `cortex-lessons-search` (FTS5) · `cortex-export-lessons` · `cortex-wiki-consolidate` |
| **Misc** | `cortex-evolve-ab` (A/B prompt evals) · `cortex-doc-audit` (agent-readability scorer) |

All shipped as delegate-shims in `~/.claude/shared/bin/` pointing back to `$CORTEX_SOURCE/bin/*.cjs`. Roster: [`bin/README.md`](../bin/README.md).

### 4.2 The 14 skills (natural-language-discoverable)

| Skill | Auto-invoke triggers (CZ + EN) | Phase / behavior |
|---|---|---|
| **`cortex-init`** | "začni" · "nastav cortex" · "set up cortex" · "I installed cortex" | Interactive picker (New / Existing / Framework-only); chains to `/start` or `/audit` |
| **`cortex-help`** | "co umíš?" · "what can cortex do?" | One-screen menu of skills + CLIs + capability count |
| **`cortex-doctor`** | "cortex není v pořádku" · "is cortex healthy" | Health-check + per-finding auto-fix interactive |
| **`cortex-goal`** | "vyřeš to autonomně" · "overnight" · "use my unused tokens" · "běhej v noci" | Plan-first wrapper for native `/goal`; embeds R1+R2 + spec-verifier as DoD |
| **`cortex-update`** | "aktualizuj cortex" · "update cortex" | Fast-forward source + re-run installer |
| **`cortex-uninstall`** | "smaž cortex" · "uninstall cortex" | Safe removal; preserves `$CORTEX_DATA_HOME` by default |
| **`audit`** | "audituj projekt" · "audit my project" · "what does this codebase do" | 12-dimension audit on existing repo. P0 detect → P1 repo-map → P2 4-agent → P3 human gate → P4 research → P5 synthesis → P6 ADR backfill |
| **`designer`** | "navrhni mi web" · "redesign this" · "make it look premium" | 5-phase designer flow (DS bootstrap → intake → plan → worktree-parallel → live iteration → Stitch handoff). Opt-in `--award` for Awwwards-tier. Sprint 2.40: now consumes `standards/visual-taste.md` rules layer |
| **`start`** | "začni nový projekt" · "scaffold this" · "naskafolduj mi projekt" | NEW-project bootstrap: Discover → Research → Architect → Scaffold → Adapt |
| **`test-audit`** | "ohodnoť testy" · "test strategy review" | QA-retrofit lens; ISO 25010:2023 + OWASP ASVS + Bach HTSM |
| **`ralph-loop`** | "loop until done" · "fix all X until tests pass" · "spusť ralph" | Ralph Wiggum autonomous loop; PRD.md + fix_plan.md + per-iteration fresh context |
| **`ux-copywriter`** | "napiš mi text" · "potřebuju copy" · "lokalizuj UI do CZ" | Bilingual CZ+EN UX copy; voice intake → framework pick → length budgets → AI-slop blocklist → CZ lint |
| **`external-adapter-hyperframes`** | "render the landing as a 30-second video" | HTML → video bridge (Sprint 3.4 v0 scaffold) |
| **`improve-codebase-architecture`** | "prohlub moduly" · "make this codebase agent-friendly" | Read-only audit: deep vs shallow modules + zero-test modules |

Skills auto-discovered from `shared/skills/*/SKILL.md`. SKILL.md spec follows agentskills.io — portable across Claude Code / Cursor / Codex.

### 4.3 The 10 agents (review + orchestration)

**Review pipeline (6 — invoked in parallel on non-trivial diffs):**

| Agent | Role | Tools |
|---|---|---|
| [`blind-hunter`](../agents/blind-hunter.md) | Diff only · NO project context · catches bugs contextual reviewers rationalize away | Read, Grep |
| [`edge-case-hunter`](../agents/edge-case-hunter.md) | Walks every branch + boundary methodically; reports unhandled cases | Read, Grep, Glob |
| [`acceptance-auditor`](../agents/acceptance-auditor.md) | Spec vs reality: did the diff do EXACTLY what was asked (no scope creep)? | Read, Grep |
| [`security-auditor`](../agents/security-auditor.md) | OWASP 8-layer + Layer 9 agentic (lethal trifecta, 7 MUST patterns) + CWE refs | Read, Grep |
| [`correctness-auditor`](../agents/correctness-auditor.md) | 5 practices: trust-boundary validation · property tests · evals · mutation · stateful simulation | Read, Grep |
| [`ssot-enforcer`](../agents/ssot-enforcer.md) | Duplication detective: constants, labels, copy-paste, multiple-truth | Read, Grep, Glob |

**Orchestration agents (4):**

| Agent | Role |
|---|---|
| [`planner`](../agents/planner.md) | Picks 3–5 research topics from `{profile} × {concern}` matrix for parallel dispatch |
| [`synthesizer`](../agents/synthesizer.md) | Merges parallel research outputs → `cortex/recommendations.md` + appends `## Stack reality check` to CLAUDE.md. Enforces 3-hop citation traceability |
| [`cortex-thinker`](../agents/cortex-thinker.md) | Cross-project reflection on SessionStart / Stop / `/cortex-reflect`. Surfaces 1-2 grounded insights, never hallucinates patterns |
| [`claude-code-guide`](../agents/claude-code-guide.md) (if present) | Authoritative answers to Claude Code questions (hooks, MCP, settings, SDK) |

### 4.4 Composition (skill → agent → CLI)

```
/audit  → planner agent → 4 parallel audit agents → synthesizer → cortex/recommendations.md
                                                                ↓
                                                          cortex-doctor (health verify)
                                                                ↓
/cortex-goal  → cortex-goal skill writes plan.md  →  native /goal runs Haiku-verifier loop
                                                                ↓
                                                          On non-trivial diff:
                                                          R2 pipeline (6 agents parallel)
                                                                ↓
                                                          pre-commit-review-gate
                                                          allows commit
                                                                ↓
                                                          Steward nightly picks up
                                                          new recommendations
```

---

## 5. Architecture + automation — Standards · Workflows · Detectors · Prompts

### 5.1 Standards by tier (the 30 + 2 ref + 1 meta = 34)

**Rule 0 — Distribution gate (1):** [`ship-ready`](../standards/ship-ready.md) — PII grep + license scan + stranger-reproducible install before everything else.

**Rule 1 — Inviolable invariants (3 + 1 meta) — PR block on violation:**
[`RULE-1`](../standards/RULE-1.md) meta · [`ssot`](../standards/ssot.md) · [`modular`](../standards/modular.md) · [`scalable`](../standards/scalable.md)

**Rule 1.5 — Behavioral contracts (4):**
[`coding-behavior`](../standards/coding-behavior.md) + [examples](../standards/coding-behavior-examples.md) · [`auto-optimization`](../standards/auto-optimization.md) · [`auto-orchestration`](../standards/auto-orchestration.md) · [`self-correction`](../standards/self-correction.md)

**Rule 2 — Critical / must-have (9) — review pipeline blocker:**
[`security`](../standards/security.md) (8-layer + § Agentic) · [`testing`](../standards/testing.md) · [`observability`](../standards/observability.md) (+ § Runtime SLOs) · [`correctness`](../standards/correctness.md) (5 practices + § Reward hacking) · [`verification-loop`](../standards/verification-loop.md) · [`context-engineering`](../standards/context-engineering.md) (Sprint 2.31, smart-zone budget) · [`mutation-testing`](../standards/mutation-testing.md) · [`multi-agent-supervisor`](../standards/multi-agent-supervisor.md) (6 safety contracts) · [`steward-policy`](../standards/steward-policy.md)

**Rule 3 — Process / should-have (12) — review warning:**
[`performance`](../standards/performance.md) · [`accessibility`](../standards/accessibility.md) · [`error-handling`](../standards/error-handling.md) · [`git-workflow`](../standards/git-workflow.md) · [`documentation`](../standards/documentation.md) · [`ai-patterns`](../standards/ai-patterns.md) (10 agentic patterns) · [`ai-sdks`](../standards/ai-sdks.md) (Vercel/Claude/OpenAI decision tree) · [`web-research`](../standards/web-research.md) · [`voice`](../standards/voice.md) · [`skills`](../standards/skills.md) (agentskills.io spec) · [`skill-validate`](../standards/skill-validate.md) (3-tier validator) · [`visual-taste`](../standards/visual-taste.md) (Sprint 2.40, MIT-vendored anti-slop)

**Supporting reference (2):** [`test-types-catalog`](../standards/test-types-catalog.md) · [`story-sizing`](../standards/story-sizing.md)

### 5.2 The 23 GitHub workflows

**CI gates (4 — always-on, push-triggered) — all 🟢 green:**

| Workflow | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `test.yml` | Full `npm test` suite (~1m07s) |
| `install-smoke.yml` | 5-lane matrix (ubuntu-bash, macos-bash, win-gitbash, win-pwsh7, win-ps51) |
| `no-pii.yml` | PII scanner (PR-scope) |
| `capabilities-refresh.yml` | Regenerate `cortex/capabilities.{md,json}` on relevant path changes |

**Steward cron workflows (16) — schedule-driven autonomous maintenance:**

| Cron time (UTC) | Workflow | Action kind |
|---|---|---|
| 02:00 Sun | `steward-autoresearch.yml` | autoresearch burst (~$0.022/run) |
| 02:00 Sun | `steward-secret-history-sweep.yml` | trufflehog git history |
| 03:00 Sun | `steward-workflow-hardener.yml` | .github/workflows linting |
| 03:00 Daily | `steward-evolve-daily.yml` | Phase A consolidation ($0) |
| 03:00 Sat | `steward-doc-drift.yml` | exports vs docs |
| 03:30 Daily | `steward-harvest.yml` | refill recommendations.md |
| 03:30 Mon | `steward-tech-debt-audit.yml` | qlty + knip probes |
| 03:30 Wed | `steward-todo-triage.yml` | TODO/FIXME → gh issues |
| 03:30 Fri | `steward-test-coverage-gap.yml` | coverage + recent edits |
| 04:00 Daily | `steward.yml` (**nightly main loop**) | recommendation (LLM, $5/d cap) |
| 04:00 Sun | `steward-evolve-weekly.yml` | mistake mining (LLM-validated) |
| 04:00 1st-of-month | `steward-senior-tester-review.yml` | deep QA audit |
| 04:15 Daily | `steward-lint-fix.yml` | `eslint --fix` + tsc |
| 04:30 Daily | `steward-dep-patch.yml` | patch-only npm bumps |
| 05:00 Daily | `steward-flaky-test-repair.yml` | `// FLAKY` → `.skip` + issues |
| Every 6h | `steward-pr-review-responder.yml` | poll Steward PR comments |

**Special / manual (3):**

| Workflow | Trigger | Health |
|---|---|---|
| `stryker.yml` | **workflow_dispatch ONLY** (parked Sprint 2.40) | 🔴 sandbox `FIXTURE_SHA_DRIFT` — Sprint 2.41 debug |
| `steward-key-probe.yml` | workflow_dispatch | 🟢 smoke-test OPENROUTER_API_KEY (~$0.0001) |
| `steward-eval-baseline.yml` | workflow_dispatch | 🟢 manual eval runner |

**Known current operational state:**

- `steward.yml` nightly: 🟡 occasional LLM-bad-edit (`str_replace anchor not found`) → exit 1 = "nothing to commit today." Verifier+rollback working as designed; not infrastructure.
- `stryker.yml`: parked — see Sprint 2.41 in roadmap. 3 cascading bugs fixed during 2026-06-01 debug; 4th (sandbox `FIXTURE_SHA_DRIFT`) deferred.

### 5.3 The 19 detectors (deterministic probes)

| Cluster | Files |
|---|---|
| **Profile** | `detect-profile` · `detect-stage` · `detect-user-identity` · `detect-sister-env` |
| **Recommendation feeders** | `lint-fix` · `dep-update-patch` · `todo-triage` · `doc-drift` · `recommendation-harvest` |
| **Test quality** | `test-coverage-gap` · `senior-tester-review` · `flaky-test-repair` |
| **Ops hardening** | `tech-debt-audit` · `workflow-hardener` · `secret-history-sweep` · `pr-review-responder` |
| **Self-improvement** | `evolve-daily` · `evolve-weekly` · `skill-proposal-mining` |

All <100ms, no LLM, fail-open. Output: structured JSON → Steward dispatcher.

### 5.4 The 20 prompts

| Cluster | Files |
|---|---|
| **Bootstrap** | `new-project.md` (→ `/start`) · `existing-project-audit.md` (→ `/audit`) · `retrofit.md` · `qa-retrofit.md` (→ `/test-audit`) · `onboarding-first-10min.md` · `project-scan.md` · `cortex-goal.md` |
| **Self-improvement** | `cortex-evolve.md` (weekly/monthly) · `cortex-load.md` · `cortex-sync.md` · `cortex-reflect.md` |
| **Operations** | `cortex-doctor.md` · `steward-setup.md` · `retrospective.md` · `sprint-status.md` |
| **Code review** | `code-review.md` (Sprint 1: two-pass confidence-validation) · `auto-review.md` · `95-confidence.md` · `agent-first-audit.md` |

## 6. Coverage heatmap (npm run test:coverage, 2026-06-01)

**Total: 84% statements · 77% branches · 88% functions · 84% lines** (3270 tests pass, 2 skip)

| Area | Stmt % | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| `detectors/_lib/` | 94% | Excellent. Pure functions, easy to cover. |
| `shared/hooks/_lib/review-agents.cjs` | 100% | Sprint 2.39 — small SSOT module, fully tested. |
| `shared/hooks/block-destructive.cjs` | 100% | Critical safety hook, full coverage. |
| `shared/hooks/pre-commit-review-gate.cjs` | 99% | Sprint 2.39 — only fail-open allow() in main catch uncovered (lines 100-101). |
| `shared/hooks/pre-compact.cjs` | 95% | Strong. |
| `shared/hooks/auto-orchestrate.cjs` | 87% | Some budget/decision-tree branches uncovered. |
| `tools/` (verify-*, eval-*) | 84% | Solid. |
| `shared/hooks/session-start.cjs` | 79% | Lots of fallback branches not exercised. |
| `shared/hooks/post-tool-use.cjs` | 70% | Branch coverage only 34% — many privacy/error paths. |
| `shared/hooks/tirith-scan.cjs` | **44%** | **Lowest** — optional Rust-binary hook with many install-state branches. |
| `shared/hooks/_lib/budget.cjs` | **38%** | **Low** — most paths only fire under `CORTEX_BUDGET_DISABLED=0`; flat-sub default disables. |
| `tools/lib/resolve-cortex-home.cjs` | 68% | YAML fallback paths under-tested. |

**Coverage NOT collected** for `bin/steward/**` (it's not in the `--include` list in `package.json:test:coverage`). The Steward subsystem is exercised by 51 unit/integration test files but coverage isn't measured. That's a real gap — biggest LOC in the repo, no instrumentation.

---

## 7. Complexity hot-spots (LOC as a proxy)

The 15 largest `.cjs` files (where bugs hide most):

| LOC | File | What it is |
|---|---|---|
| **2778** | `bin/steward/execute.cjs` | Steward orchestrator. Plan → execute → verify → commit → rollback. |
| **1969** | `bin/steward/_lib/action-engine.cjs` | LLM dispatch + edit application. Pluggable engine seam. |
| 1028 | `bin/steward/_lib/spec-verifier.cjs` | 6-kind acceptance criteria runner (shell / file_predicate / regex / ears_text / llm_judge / read_set). |
| 926 | `bin/steward/_lib/action-kinds.cjs` | The 18-kind registry (acceptance criteria, topology, requires_llm). |
| 838 | `bin/steward/_lib/autoresearch.cjs` | Sprint 2.1 overnight 3-candidate research burst. |
| 832 | `bin/steward/dry-run.cjs` | Plan-only entry. No side effects. |
| 738 | `bin/steward/_lib/test-smell-detector.cjs` | 16-smell regex pattern library. |
| 667 | `bin/steward/_lib/otel-emitter.cjs` | Zero-dep OTLP HTTP/JSON for Phoenix. |
| 631 | `bin/steward/_lib/senior-tester-action.cjs` | Phase A detector + Phase B judge + Phase C deliverer. |
| 595 | `bin/cortex-capabilities.cjs` | Filesystem-scan registry regenerator. |
| 593 | `bin/steward/_lib/self-invocation.cjs` | Sprint 2.13.1 invocation tracking. |
| 580 | `bin/cortex-skill-validate.cjs` | 3-tier skill validator (spec / Claude Code / cortex opinion). |
| 539 | `bin/steward/_lib/research-trigger.cjs` | Deterministic research-mode detector. |
| 539 | `bin/cortex-insights.cjs` | Insights aggregator across journal + claude-projects. |
| 533 | `bin/steward/_lib/wiki-consolidate.cjs` | Phase A Obsidian wiki emission. |

**Pattern:** 11 of 15 are in `bin/steward/`. Steward is the complexity sink — and the area with no coverage measurement.

---

## 8. Seam map (the major interfaces)

Where subsystems touch each other:

| Seam | Producer → Consumer | Contract |
|---|---|---|
| **journal SSOT** | `post-tool-use` writes JSONL → `cortex-usage` / `cortex-insights` / `cost-safety` / `status.cjs` read it | `{ts, project, tool, duration_ms, ok, summary, file?, error?}` per line. Privacy: only metadata. |
| **review marker** | `post-tool-use` writes `$TMP/cortex-review-<sessionHash>.flag` when a review agent fires → `pre-commit-review-gate` reads it | Single file, content = ISO timestamp. SSOT for the agent roster: [`shared/hooks/_lib/review-agents.cjs`](../shared/hooks/_lib/review-agents.cjs). |
| **recommendations queue** | `recommendation_harvest` action appends → `recommendations.md` → `dry-run.cjs` parses + picks first actionable | Markdown with YAML frontmatter. Dedup via `lessons.jsonl` lookup. |
| **spec-verifier gate** | `action-kinds.cjs` declares `acceptance_criteria[]` → `spec-verifier.cjs` runs each predicate after edits, before commit | 6 criterion kinds; fail = atomic rollback. |
| **engine seam** | `routing-table.cjs` picks model + engine → `action-engine.cjs` dispatches | `mock` / `openrouter` / `claude-sdk` (stub). Cost capture in headers. |
| **augment block** | `cortex-claude-md-augment` writes into `~/.claude/CLAUDE.md` between `<!-- BEGIN cortex-x discipline (vN) — managed by cortex-claude-md-augment -->` and `<!-- END cortex-x discipline -->` markers → loaded into every session | Currently v6 (Sprint 2.44 — workflows awareness; v5 broadened R1 to "research before assert"). |
| **HOOK_SPEC alignment** | `cortex-hooks-register.cjs` HOOK_SPEC → install.{sh,ps1} INSTALL_NOTES heredoc → test enforces alignment (`HIGH#5` in `tests/unit/cortex-hooks-register.test.cjs`) | Sprint 2.40: alignment test now covers both install.sh AND install.ps1 (previously sh-only) |
| **lessons recall** | `execute.cjs` failure → `lessons.cjs` appends → next `action-engine` LLM prompt seeded with prior lessons for (action_kind, action_key) | Prevents repeating the same failure. Aged out by `memory-decay.cjs`. |
| **sibling repos** | `pattern_transfer` action → `sibling-reader.cjs` (read-only) → distill into local `lessons.jsonl` | Strict path safety: no `..`, no `\\`, no drive-letters, no absolute paths. |
| workflow runtime hooks | dynamic workflow subagent dispatch then Task tool then post-tool-use.cjs handles subagent_type per _lib/review-agents.cjs SSOT verified Sprint 2.44 probe | Workflow agents inherit cortex hook layer transparently same acceptEdits mode rule per Anthropic docs |

---

| Concern | Start here | Then |
|---|---|---|
| **How Steward actually runs an action** | [`bin/steward/dry-run.cjs`](../bin/steward/dry-run.cjs) → [`execute.cjs`](../bin/steward/execute.cjs) | Then [`_lib/action-engine.cjs`](../bin/steward/_lib/action-engine.cjs) for the LLM call + [`_lib/spec-verifier.cjs`](../bin/steward/_lib/spec-verifier.cjs) for the gate |
| **Why a commit got denied** | [`shared/hooks/pre-commit-review-gate.cjs`](../shared/hooks/pre-commit-review-gate.cjs) | Then [`_lib/review-agents.cjs`](../shared/hooks/_lib/review-agents.cjs) for the roster + the deny-reason text builder |
| **What a hook writes** | [`shared/hooks/post-tool-use.cjs`](../shared/hooks/post-tool-use.cjs) | Then [`_lib/redact.cjs`](../shared/hooks/_lib/redact.cjs) for the privacy contract |
| **The institutional ruleset** | [`standards/README.md`](../standards/README.md) — tier hierarchy | Pick a tier, deep-read 2 standards. Always read [`RULE-1.md`](../standards/RULE-1.md) first |
| **What auto-orchestration does** | [`shared/hooks/auto-orchestrate.cjs`](../shared/hooks/auto-orchestrate.cjs) | Then [`standards/auto-orchestration.md`](../standards/auto-orchestration.md) for the 3-fronta rationale |
| **Action_kinds the Steward can run** | [`bin/steward/_lib/action-kinds.cjs`](../bin/steward/_lib/action-kinds.cjs) — the registry | Then [`docs/steward-roadmap.md`](../docs/steward-roadmap.md) for the shipped-in version history |
| **Why CI is currently green** | This file § 5.2 (workflows) + § 9 (health) | Then `gh run list --branch main --limit 10` |
| **What cortex-usage measures** | [`bin/cortex-usage.cjs`](../bin/cortex-usage.cjs) — Sprint 2.38 | Run it: `node bin/cortex-usage.cjs --since 2026-04-01` |
| **What visual-taste enforces** | [`standards/visual-taste.md`](../standards/visual-taste.md) — Sprint 2.40 | Read the pre-flight § 3 first — it's the mechanical checklist |
| **How a skill auto-invokes** | [`shared/skills/<name>/SKILL.md`](../shared/skills/) — the `description:` frontmatter is the trigger phrase library | Then [`standards/skills.md`](../standards/skills.md) for the agentskills.io spec |

## 11. oh-my-claudecode reconnaissance — selective vendor recommendation

**Repo:** [github.com/Yeachan-Heo/oh-my-claudecode](https://github.com/Yeachan-Heo/oh-my-claudecode) (MIT, 35k★, active daily). Competing personal Claude Code framework — own brand, own npm runtime (`oh-my-claude-sisyphus`), own HUD statusline, own Discord. Surface: 41 skills · 19 agents · 26 commands · 1 hooks bundle · 4 missions · full plugin runtime under `/src/` and `/dist/`.

**Verdict: SELECTIVE VENDOR — 4 high-value pieces.** Skip everything else. Bringing the full set in would dilute cortex's positioning and force a brand merge.

### 11.1 The 4 vendor candidates

| # | OMC source | Cortex target | Why |
|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | `skills/deep-interview/SKILL.md` | `shared/skills/deep-interview/SKILL.md` | Operationalizes cortex's [`prompts/95-confidence.md`](../prompts/95-confidence.md) baseline into an interactive multi-round Socratic flow with **quantitative ambiguity scoring** + weakest-dimension targeting + state persistence. Cortex has the rule; OMC has the executable loop. ~2-3h vendor cost. |
| 2 | `agents/critic.md` | `agents/critic.md` | Codifies *"false-approval costs 10-100×&nbsp;false-rejection"* + structured what's-MISSING gap analysis + multi-perspective review (security/new-hire/ops for code; executor/stakeholder/skeptic for plans) + ADVERSARIAL escalation mode. Complements cortex's existing 6-reviewer pipeline. ~1h cost. |
| 3 | `skills/visual-verdict/SKILL.md` | `shared/skills/visual-verdict/SKILL.md` | Strict JSON output contract (`{score, verdict, category_match, differences[], suggestions[]}`) for screenshot-vs-reference comparison. Pairs natively with cortex's `designer` skill + new `visual-taste.md`. Closes the deterministic-iteration-loop gap. ~30 min cost. |
| 4 | `skills/ralplan/SKILL.md` (pattern, not raw lift) | `prompts/consensus-planning.md` | Planner+Architect+Critic 3-agent consensus loop with explicit `pending approval` gate BEFORE execution — front-loaded R2 on the PLAN, not just the implementation. Plus `--deliberate` mode (pre-mortem + 3 scenarios) for high-risk work. ~3-4h cost (rebuild as cortex prompt, not raw vendor). |

### 11.2 What to skip (and why)

- All `omc-*` / `ralph` / `ultragoal` / `ultrawork` / `ultraqa` / `autopilot` skills — cortex has equivalents (`cortex-doctor` / `cortex-init` / `ralph-loop` / `cortex-goal` / `auto-orchestrate` / R2 pipeline). OMC versions are more vertically integrated but their integration is OMC-brand-coupled.
- `autoresearch` — cortex Steward owns this lane (Sprint 2.1, cron Sunday 02:00 UTC).
- `hud` / `ccg` / `ask` — coupled to OMC's npm runtime + tmux CLI worker; not portable.
- `agents/code-reviewer` / `security-reviewer` / `test-engineer` / `qa-tester` / `executor` / `designer` — cortex's specialized 6-agent pipeline + 4 orchestration agents already cover these better.
- `hooks/hooks.json` — cortex's 8-hook layer is more granular and SSOT-aligned. **BUT** the `keyword-detector` + `skill-injector` pattern (auto-suggest skills based on prompt keywords) is novel and worth re-implementing later (not lifted) — added to backlog notes.
- Everything in `/src/` `/dist/` `/bridge/` `/shellmark/` `/missions/` `/templates/` — runtime, not framework content.

### 11.3 Vendor mechanics (mirroring Sprint 2.40 taste-skill pattern)

- License header per vendored file: `<!-- Derived from oh-my-claudecode/<path> (MIT) — adapted 2026-06-01 -->`
- `NOTICE` line: `Portions derived from oh-my-claudecode (MIT, © Yeachan Heo) — see <file headers>`
- Translation pass: all references to `Skill("oh-my-claudecode:...")` / `Task(subagent_type="oh-my-claudecode:...")` / `.omc/state/` / `.omc/skills/` / `companyContext.tool` need translation to cortex equivalents.

**Total effort estimate: ~8h including R2 review pipeline on the vendored content.** Recommend slotting as Sprint 2.42 (after Sprint 2.41 stryker debug).

---
